description: Google Sheet mapping for the Weekly EBITDA workbook. All data sources and output tabs.

sales.description: Spa weekly sales data — already aggregated by week, per spa. Ex VAT.

spa_sales_section.header_label: Sales - from guest sales report (Services & Packages)

aesthetics.description: Aesthetics KPIs — service revenue, retail, consults, etc.

leticia_aesthetics.title: Aesthetics sales - Leticia
leticia_aesthetics.description: Transaction-level aesthetics sales. Monthly tabs named 'Sale {Month} {Year}' or 'Sales {Month} {Year}'. Group by week using date column.
leticia_aesthetics.notes: Prices appear with $ symbol but are EUR. Group transactions by week (Mon-Sun) to get weekly totals.

slimming_sales.title: Slimming Sales March
slimming_sales.description: Transaction-level slimming sales. Monthly tabs named 'Sales {Month}'. Group by week using date column.
slimming_sales.notes: Use 'Paid' column (H) for actual revenue received. 'Full price' (G) is list price before payment plans. Started Feb 2026.

zoho_spa_pl.description: Full P&L export from Zoho Books for Carisma Spa & Wellness International Ltd.
zoho_spa_pl.source: Zoho Books → Reports → Profit and Loss → Export

zoho_aesthetics_pl.description: Full P&L export from Zoho Books for Aesthetics entity.
zoho_aesthetics_pl.source: Zoho Books → Reports → Profit and Loss → Export

lapis_revenue.description: Revenue by spa location, split by Service vs Product. Already VAT-exclusive from Lapis.
lapis_revenue.source: Lapis POS → Quick Service Search + Material Report

lapis_cogs.description: Cost of goods sold by product line (Phytomer, Purest, Others) per spa.

payroll.description: Monthly payroll data by employee with spa assignment.

cash_salaries.description: Cash salary payments by employee with spa assignment.

sga_detail.description: SG&A line items with allocation categories.

aesthetics_data.description: Aesthetics-specific data: revenue, doctor payouts, staff costs, COGS.

fixed_costs.description: Weekly proportional fixed costs (towels, linens, slippers, amenities).

ebitda_summary.description: Group-level weekly EBITDA. Spa + Aesthetics + Slimming. Weeks as columns.

spa_detail.description: Per-spa weekly P&L: Trading Income, Wages, Advertising, Rent, Utilities, COGS, SG&A, OPEX, EBITDA. Each spa in its own section.

aesthetics_pl.description: Aesthetics weekly P&L in standard format.

slimming_pl.description: Slimming weekly P&L in standard format. Started Feb 2026.

reconciliation.description: Revenue, Salaries, SG&A, and Rent checks with pass/fail and variance.
